example_sentence: El narrador en primera persona ofrece una visión subjetiva de los hechos.
example_translation: The first-person narrator offers a subjective view of events.

example_sentence: La trama de la novela se desarrolla en tres tiempos distintos.
example_translation: The plot of the novel unfolds across three different time periods.

example_sentence: El desenlace sorprendente recontextualiza todos los eventos anteriores.
example_translation: The surprising resolution recontextualizes all previous events.

example_sentence: La focalización interna limita al lector al conocimiento de un solo personaje.
example_translation: Internal focalization limits the reader to the knowledge of a single character.

example_sentence: La analepsis revela el origen del conflicto entre los personajes.
example_translation: The flashback reveals the origin of the conflict between the characters.

example_sentence: La intertextualidad entre estas dos novelas enriquece la lectura de ambas.
example_translation: The intertextuality between these two novels enriches the reading of both.

example_sentence: Lo real maravilloso trata lo sobrenatural como parte ordinaria de la realidad.
example_translation: Magical realism treats the supernatural as an ordinary part of reality.

example_sentence: El flujo de conciencia reproduce los pensamientos sin filtrar del personaje.
example_translation: Stream of consciousness reproduces the character's unfiltered thoughts.

example_sentence: Este pasaje pone de manifiesto la soledad del protagonista.
example_translation: This passage reveals the protagonist's loneliness.

example_sentence: Todo argumento analítico debe apoyarse en citas textuales del texto.
example_translation: Every analytical argument must be supported by textual citations.

example_sentence: El simbolismo del agua en la novela representa la vida y la muerte simultáneamente.
example_translation: The symbolism of water in the novel represents life and death simultaneously.

translation: to make use of / to avail oneself of
example_sentence: El autor se vale de la ironía para criticar las instituciones sociales.
example_translation: The author makes use of irony to criticize social institutions.
